name: voxium
description: Voxium - Modern voice & text communication platform

scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:desktop
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:server & pnpm run build:desktop
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @voxium/server exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @voxium/desktop exec tsc --noEmit
